Finding Summary: Portable Electron app has plugin system and future hooks note for BeamNG telemetry OBS status and command messages
Why It Matters: This can become an external recording dashboard paired with an in-game bridge
Recommended Action: Use a small RedFox telemetry bridge mod plus local Electron plugin; start one-way read-only telemetry before any control commands
Notes: App already reads OS stats/weather/plugins; no BeamNG bridge/server present yet
